The [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] '''Firespray DL-87 stun rifle''' was an unusual [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]]. It was primarily designed to knock out opponents rather than killing them. It had a wide muzzle, with two transceptors mounted in the corners of the [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]]. It could deliver normal damage, but it was short-ranged and did very little actual damage.

{{Weapon-stub}}
